description: Coffee chat proposed then immediately cancelled in the same conversation. Alice suggests coffee tomorrow, then retracts it after realizing she has a conflict. No rescheduled time is agreed upon.

mock_llm_response.summary: No actionable calendar events found. A coffee chat was briefly proposed for tomorrow morning but immediately retracted when Alice remembered a scheduling conflict. No alternative time was confirmed — the conversation ends with a vague 'I'll reach out when things settle down'.

notes: Propose-then-cancel pattern. The initial proposal ('tomorrow morning') is superseded by the immediate retraction. The vague follow-up ('I'll reach out when things settle down') does not constitute a schedulable commitment.
